title: Dopamine C4d 3D Theme Poster AI
sourceTitle: Dopamine C4d 3D Theme Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dopamine C4D 3D illustration poster for the theme Play Wildly, centered on a glossy inflatable tiger-shaped sneaker bursting through a soft cube frame and a specific mood variant with readable visual details visual attitude. Subject: a glossy inflatable tiger-shaped sneaker bursting through a soft cube frame is the hero object, rendered as a premium soft-light 3D centerpiece with playful scale, glossy surfaces, and refined detailed modeling. Scene: Clean minimalist poster background with abstract supporting shapes, generous whitespace, and a modern internet design layout that keeps the hero object dominant. Composition: Vertical design-poster composition: hero 3D object centered or slightly offset, abstract forms framing the action, clear top or lower area for the Play Wildly theme, and balanced graphic negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved dopamine c4d 3d theme poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Behance and Dribbble 3D illustration poster aesthetic with C4D-style rendering, dopamine visual language, high-saturation cheerful art direction, soft studio light, and polished design-system finish. Color Palette: High-saturation dopamine colors, vibrant complementary accents, clean bright background, candy-like highlights, and refined contrast that stays cheerful rather than chaotic. Lighting: Soft C4D studio lighting with glossy highlights, gentle shadows, rounded form modeling, and clean product-illustration depth. Typography: Play Wildly appears as the short theme text, integrated as modern minimal poster typography without overpowering the 3D object. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
